label: Flowchart
code:
graph TD
    A[Start] --> B{Condition}
    B -->|Yes| C[Process A]
    B -->|No| D[Process B]
    C --> E[End]
    D --> E

label: Class
Sequence
code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant S as Server
    participant DB as Database
    U->>S: Request
    S->>DB: Query
    DB-->>S: Result
    S-->>U: Response

label: Entity Relationship
State
code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Processing : Start
    Processing --> Success : OK
    Processing --> Error : Fail
    Success --> [*]
    Error --> Idle : Retry
    state Processing {
        [*] --> Validating
        Validating --> Executing
        Executing --> [*]
    }

label: Mindmap
code:
mindmap
  root((Project))
    Planning
      Requirements
      Schedule
    Development
      Frontend
      Backend
      Database
    Testing
      Unit Test
      E2E Test

label: Architecture
code:
architecture-beta
    group api(cloud)[API]
    group client(cloud)[Client]

    service db(database)[Database] in api
    service server(server)[Server] in api
    service web(internet)[Web App] in client

    web:R --> L:server
    server:R --> L:db

label: Block
code:
block-beta
    columns 3
    Frontend blockArrowId6<[" "]>(right) Backend
    space:2 down<[" "]>(down)
    DB[("Database")]

label: C4
code:
C4Context
    title System Context
    Person(user, "User", "A user of the system")
    System(sys, "System", "The main system")
    System_Ext(ext, "External", "External service")
    Rel(user, sys, "Uses")
    Rel(sys, ext, "Calls")

label: Gantt
code:
gantt
    title Project Plan
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Design
    Requirements :a1, 2026-03-01, 7d
    UI Design    :a2, after a1, 5d
    section Development
    Implement    :b1, after a2, 10d
    Test         :b2, after b1, 5d

label: Git
code:
gitGraph
    commit
    commit
    branch develop
    checkout develop
    commit
    commit
    checkout main
    merge develop
    commit
    branch feature
    checkout feature
    commit
    checkout develop
    merge feature
    checkout main
    merge develop

label: Kanban
code:
kanban
    Todo
        id1["Task A"]
        id2["Task B"]
    In Progress
        id3["Task C"]
    Done
        id4["Task D"]

label: Packet
code:
packet
    0-15: "Source Port"
    16-31: "Destination Port"
    32-63: "Sequence Number"
    64-95: "Acknowledgment Number"
    96-99: "Data Offset"
    100-105: "Reserved"
    106-111: "Flags"
    112-127: "Window Size"

label: Pie
code:
pie title Browser Share
    "Chrome" : 65
    "Safari" : 19
    "Firefox" : 4
    "Edge" : 4
    "Other" : 8

label: Quadrant
code:
quadrantChart
    title Priority Matrix
    x-axis Low Effort --> High Effort
    y-axis Low Impact --> High Impact
    quadrant-1 Do First
    quadrant-2 Schedule
    quadrant-3 Delegate
    quadrant-4 Eliminate
    Task A: [0.3, 0.8]
    Task B: [0.7, 0.9]
    Task C: [0.2, 0.3]
    Task D: [0.8, 0.2]

label: Radar
code:
radar-beta
    title Skills
    axis fe["Frontend"], be["Backend"], ops["DevOps"], des["Design"], qa["Testing"]
    curve alice["Alice"]{4, 5, 3, 2, 4}
    curve bob["Bob"]{3, 3, 5, 4, 3}
    max 5
    min 0

label: Requirement
Sankey
code:
sankey-beta

Source A,Target X,30
Source A,Target Y,20
Source B,Target X,15
Source B,Target Z,25
Target X,Final,45
Target Y,Final,20
Target Z,Final,25

label: Timeline
code:
timeline
    title Project Timeline
    2026-Q1 : Design
           : Prototyping
    2026-Q2 : Development
           : Alpha Release
    2026-Q3 : Testing
           : Beta Release
    2026-Q4 : Launch

treemap
    "Products"
        "Electronics"
            "Phones": 50
            "Laptops": 40
        "Clothing"
            "Shirts": 30
            "Shoes": 20
    "Services": 25

label: User Journey
code:
journey
    title User Purchase Journey
    section Browse
      Visit site: 5: User
      Search product: 3: User
    section Purchase
      Add to cart: 4: User
      Checkout: 3: User, System
      Payment: 2: User, System
    section Post
      Receive order: 5: User

label: XY
code:
xychart-beta
    title "Sales Revenue"
    x-axis [Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun]
    y-axis "Revenue (k$)" 0 --> 120
    bar [50, 60, 75, 80, 95, 110]
    line [50, 60, 75, 80, 95, 110]

label: Ishikawa
code:
ishikawa
    problem "Low Product Quality"
    category "People"
        cause "Lack of training"
        cause "Low morale"
    category "Process"
        cause "No code review"
        cause "Unclear requirements"
    category "Tools"
        cause "Outdated CI"
    category "Environment"
        cause "Noisy office"

label: Tree View
code:
treeView-beta
    "Project"
        "Frontend"
            "Components"
            "Hooks"
        "Backend"
            "API"
            "Database"
        "Docs"

label: Venn
code:
venn-beta
    title Skill Overlap
    set fe ["Frontend"]
    set be ["Backend"]
    union fe, be ["Fullstack"]

label: Wardley
code:
wardley-beta
    title Tea Shop
    anchor Customer [0.95, 0.63]
    component Cup of Tea [0.79, 0.61]
    component Cup [0.73, 0.78]
    component Tea [0.63, 0.81]
    component Hot Water [0.52, 0.80]
    Customer -> Cup of Tea
    Cup of Tea -> Cup
    Cup of Tea -> Tea
    Cup of Tea -> Hot Water

label: Event Modeling
code:
eventmodeling
    timeframe 1
    ui PlaceOrderScreen
    timeframe 2
    command PlaceOrder
    timeframe 3
    event OrderPlaced
    timeframe 4
    readmodel OrderList
